ai_api.title: Anthropic Startup Program
ai_api.note: Up to $25K self-serve (rolling, ~2wk review); up to $100K+ via VC/accelerator referral; no equity

ai_api.title: OpenAI Grove / startup credits
ai_api.note: $50K for the 5-week Grove cohort; smaller $2,500 Ramp-linked tier

ai_api.title: Other AI providers (Mistral, Together AI, etc.)
ai_api.note: Running comparison of AI credit programs

cloud_infra.title: AWS Activate
cloud_infra.note: Founders tier $1K; Portfolio tier (VC/accelerator-backed) up to $100K; Gen-AI tier up to $300K

cloud_infra.title: Google Cloud for Startups
cloud_infra.note: Up to $100K yr1 + $100K yr2 (equity-funded); AI-First up to $350K total; unfunded Start tier up to $2K

cloud_infra.title: Microsoft Azure for Startups
cloud_infra.note: Up to $150K in credits, no VC backing required; includes GitHub Enterprise + Visual Studio Enterprise

accelerators.title: Y Combinator — Fall 2026
accelerators.note: On-time deadline Jul 27, 2026, 8pm PT — $500K investment via SAFEs
